scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send:
SIP/2.0 183 Session Progress [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[pid]SIPpTag01[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] [last_Record-Route:] Contact: <sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Av-Global-Session-ID: [$gsid] Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[pid]SIPpTag01[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] [last_Record-Route:] Contact: <sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Av-Global-Session-ID: [$gsid] P-Asserted-Identity: <sip:[field1]@[local_ip]> History-Info: <sip:16139675279@207.245.2.12;user=phone>;index=1.1 Supported: replaces Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000

INVITE [$contact] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [field0] <sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag01[call_number] To: <sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>;tag=[$FromTag2] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 INVITE Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 Av-Global-Session-ID: [$gsid] Supported: replaces Subject: Performance Test Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=sendonly

ACK [$okcontact] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [field0] <sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag01[call_number] To: <sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>;tag=[$FromTag2] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 ACK Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Av-Global-Session-ID: [$gsid] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Cntent-Length: [len]

log.message: Printing variables ReplacesCallId: [$ReplacesCallId] TargetContact: [$TargetContact] To-Tag: [$ToTag2] From-tag: [$FromTag2] [$AckFrom]

scenario.send: REFER [$contact] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [$AckTo] To: [$AckFrom] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 1 REFER Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Refer-To: <[$TargetContact]?Replaces=[$ReplacesCallId]%3Bfrom-tag%3D[$FromTag2]%3Bto-tag%3D[$ToTag2]> Av-Global-Session-ID: 4648fd4b-4f8d-4e67-a180-009c6b404664;a-gsid=[$gsid];a-source=Replaces Route: [$route] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0

REFER [$contact] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [$AckTo] To: [$AckFrom] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 1 REFER Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Refer-To: <[$TargetContact]?Replaces=[$ReplacesCallId]%3Bfrom-tag%3D[$FromTag2]%3Bto-tag%3D[$ToTag2]> Av-Global-Session-ID: 4648fd4b-4f8d-4e67-a180-009c6b404664;a-gsid=[$gsid];a-source=Replaces Route: [$route] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
